data.title: Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA ( (DE:WNL) ) just unveiled an update.

Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA has announced that its annual general meeting will take place electronically on April 29, 2025. The meeting will be webcasted live, and shareholders are encouraged to register online. The company has made available its Annual Report for 2024, along with reports on salary, remuneration, and corporate governance on its website. This announcement ensures transparency and accessibility for stakeholders, maintaining the company’s commitment to effective corporate governance.

More about Wallenius Wilhelmsen ASA

The Wallenius Wilhelmsen group is a market leader in roll-on/roll-off (RoRo) shipping and vehicle logistics, managing the distribution of cars, trucks, rolling equipment, and breakbulk globally. The company operates approximately 125 vessels across 15 trade routes on six continents, supported by a global inland distribution network, 66 processing centers, and eight marine terminals. Headquartered in Oslo, Norway, Wallenius Wilhelmsen employs around 9,500 people in 28 countries worldwide.

YTD Price Performance: -11.01%

Average Trading Volume: 1,360

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €2.57B

data.title: Enertopia Files Patent for Oxyhydrogen Technology
data.description:
Enertopia ( (ENRT) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 4, 2025, Enertopia Corporation announced the filing of a patent pending technology for a scalable automated oxyhydrogen production, storage, and utilization system. This system, developed over the past three years, aims to provide an integrated solution for producing, storing, and using oxyhydrogen gas for various applications, potentially replacing natural gas in residential, commercial, and industrial settings. The technology is designed to be eco-friendly and cost-effective, addressing rising energy costs and offering opportunities for off-grid systems and underserved communities globally.

More about Enertopia

Enertopia Corporation is an energy solutions company focused on modern technology through a combination of intellectual property patents in green technologies to build shareholder value. The company is involved in the development of eco-friendly systems and holds Nevada lithium claims, with shares quoted in the United States and Canada under the ticker symbol ENRT.

data.description:
Distribution Finance Capital Holdings Plc ( (GB:DFCH) ) just unveiled an update.

Distribution Finance Capital Holdings Plc has announced a change in the voting rights held by Watrium AS, a company based in Oslo, Norway. The notification indicates that Watrium AS has increased its voting rights in the company from 16.07% to 17.44%, which could potentially impact the company’s governance and decision-making processes.

data.title: Carnival plc Announces Voting Rights and Capital Structure
data.description:
An announcement from Carnival ( (GB:CCL) ) is now available.

Carnival plc has announced its current voting rights and capital structure as of March 31, 2025. The company has a total of 217,406,012 issued ordinary shares, with 145,379,374 shares carrying voting rights. This announcement is crucial for shareholders and stakeholders to assess their notification obligations under the FCA’s Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

More about Carnival

Carnival plc operates in the leisure and travel industry, primarily focusing on cruise vacations. The company offers a variety of cruise experiences across multiple brands, catering to a diverse market of travelers seeking leisure and adventure at sea.

data.title: Wee Hur Holdings Ltd. Reports Cybersecurity Incident
data.description:
Wee Hur Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:E3B) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Wee Hur Holdings Ltd. has announced a cybersecurity incident involving a phishing attack on its IT servers, affecting its subsidiary Y Suites Australia Pty Ltd. The company has engaged cybersecurity experts and reported the incident to the Personal Data Protection Commission in Singapore, while assessing its obligations in Australia. Preliminary assessments indicate no significant impact on business operations, and the company is reviewing its IT systems to enhance cybersecurity measures. Shareholders are advised to exercise caution in their dealings with the company’s shares.

More about Wee Hur Holdings Ltd.

Wee Hur Holdings Ltd. is a company incorporated in Singapore, operating in the hospitality industry. The company, through its subsidiary Y Suites Australia Pty Ltd, manages a portfolio of Purpose-Built Student Accommodation (PBSA) in Australia.

data.title: Xenon Pharmaceuticals to Present Promising Azetukalner Data at AAN 2025
data.description:
Xenon ( (XENE) ) just unveiled an update.

Xenon Pharmaceuticals announced that it will present long-term data on its drug azetukalner at the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting in 2025. The data from the X-TOLE open-label extension study shows sustained reduction in seizure frequency and impressive seizure freedom rates in patients with focal onset seizures, suggesting long-term efficacy and tolerability. The company will also present findings on the mental health burdens of epilepsy and the efficacy of azetukalner across different seizure subtypes, potentially enhancing its positioning in the epilepsy treatment market.

More about Xenon

Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a neuroscience-focused biopharmaceutical company dedicated to discovering, developing, and delivering life-changing therapeutics. The company is advancing an ion channel product portfolio to address areas of high unmet medical need, including epilepsy and depression. Azetukalner, a novel and highly potent Kv7 potassium channel opener, is their most advanced product in late-stage clinical development for multiple indications.

data.title: Xplora Technologies AS Resilient Amid US Tariff Changes
data.description:
Xplora Technologies AS ( (DE:86P) ) has issued an update.

Xplora Technologies AS anticipates minimal impact from the recent US import tariffs due to its diversified business model and strong financial position. With most sales in Europe and the Nordics, and a significant portion of revenue from recurring services not subject to tariffs, Xplora remains resilient. The company has also secured a long-term loan facility to ensure financial flexibility, positioning itself well for continued growth and shareholder value.

More about Xplora Technologies AS

Xplora Technologies AS is a platform and services company specializing in children’s smartwatches. Founded to provide a safe digital onboarding for children and promote a balance between screen time and physical activity, Xplora aims to enable children to create value and make positive changes in the world. Headquartered in Norway, the company operates in leading European markets and is listed on Euronext Growth under the ticker symbol XPLRA.

data.title: SIMPPLE Ltd. Secures Second Contract for Autonomous Cleaning Robots at Singapore Airport
data.description:
Simpple Ltd. ( (SPPL) ) has issued an announcement.

SIMPPLE Ltd., a leader in the facilities management sector, announced on April 4, 2025, that it has secured a second contract worth $524,000 to supply autonomous cleaning robots to Singapore’s international airport. This follows a previous contract awarded on November 15, 2024, valued at $400,000. These contracts are part of the airport’s renewal program, with SIMPPLE’s innovative solutions reinforcing its position as a trusted partner in the industry. The company’s success in securing these contracts highlights its commitment to delivering cutting-edge robotics and maintaining strong customer relationships.

More about Simpple Ltd.

Headquartered in Singapore, SIMPPLE LTD. is an advanced technology solution provider in the emerging PropTech space, focused on helping facilities owners and managers manage facilities autonomously. Founded in 2016, the Company has a strong foothold in the Singapore facilities management market, serving over 60 clients in both the public and private sectors and extending out of Singapore into Australia and the Middle East. The Company has developed its proprietary SIMPPLE Ecosystem, to create an automated workforce management tool for building maintenance, surveillance and cleaning comprised of a mix of software and hardware solutions such as robotics (both cleaning and security) and Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices.

data.title: Currys plc Announces Change in Major Shareholder Holdings
data.description:
An announcement from Currys plc ( (GB:CURY) ) is now available.

Currys plc has announced a change in its major holdings, with Cobas Asset Management, SGIIC, S.A., a Madrid-based investment management firm, adjusting its voting rights in the company. As of April 3, 2025, Cobas Asset Management holds 6.823144% of the voting rights in Currys plc, a slight decrease from its previous position of 7.115493%. This adjustment reflects a strategic decision by Cobas Asset Management and may influence stakeholder perceptions regarding the company’s governance and future direction.

More about Currys plc

Currys plc is a UK-based company operating in the retail industry, primarily focusing on the sale of consumer electronics and home appliances. The company serves a broad market, catering to consumers seeking a wide range of electronic products and related services.

data.title: Riverside Resources Secures Court Approval for Blue Jay Spin-Out
data.description:
An announcement from Riverside Resources ( (TSE:RRI) ) is now available.

Riverside Resources Inc. has received final court approval from the Supreme Court of British Columbia for the spin-out of its subsidiary, Blue Jay Gold Corp. The transaction, pending final approval from the TSX Venture Exchange, is expected to be completed in the second quarter of 2025. This strategic move allows Riverside to focus on its core exploration activities while potentially enhancing shareholder value through the separate listing of Blue Jay’s shares.

More about Riverside Resources

Riverside Resources Inc. is a well-funded exploration company focused on value generation and discovery in the mining industry. The company holds a strong portfolio of gold-silver and copper assets and royalties in North America, with operations primarily in Mexico and Canada. Riverside leverages its extensive database to generate prospective mineral properties and diversifies risk through joint-venture and spin-out partnerships.
